summary: Major restructuring of pagination: moved gray bar to nav-links container, current page uses gradient overlay, 8px gaps between elements, prev/next use mask-image with tertiary-arrow.svg for reliable arrow display
userRevisions: Move gray bar from individual items to single continuous bar on nav-links
Current page uses gradient ::after overlay on top of gray bar
Replace fragile background-image layering with mask-image technique for arrows

changes: Added relative positioning
Changed gap-0 to gap-2 (8px gaps)
Added ::after pseudo-element for single continuous gray bar (4px, rgba(31,31,29,0.5), border-radius 10px, positioned at bottom: 0)
REMOVED ::after pseudo-element (gray bar)
Kept transparent border for hover
Kept hover effect (gradient + border-color)
CHANGED ::after from inheriting gray bar to gradient overlay
New ::after: positioned at bottom: -12px, z-index: 1, gradient background, 4px height, border-radius 10px
Overlays the nav-links gray bar exactly
REMOVED ::after override (no longer needed since gray bar is on nav-links)
Kept pointer-events-none
REMOVED ::after pseudo-element (gray bar)
REMOVED text-white utility (not needed with mask-image approach)
ADDED ::before pseudo-element for arrow icon using mask-image
Changed from background-image layering to simple background: linear-gradient
Arrow icon: 14x11px white background with mask-image (tertiary-arrow.svg as data URI)
REMOVED old background-image data URI rules
ADDED ::before transform: scaleX(-1) to flip arrow left
REMOVED old background-image data URI rules
Arrow uses default ::before (points right)

problems: Multiple ::after elements hard to align perfectly

benefits: One continuous bar spanning entire width
Simpler to maintain (one element instead of many)
Container-level positioning (bottom: 0 with pb-3 creates space)
grayBar_after.implementation: .nav-links::after positioned absolutely at bottom: 0, spans full width

currentPageIndicator_before.approach: .current::after changed background color from gray to gradient
currentPageIndicator_before.problems: Same bar as other items, just different color

benefits: Gradient bar sits ON TOP of gray bar
currentPageIndicator_after.implementation: Positioned at bottom: -12px (negative of pb-3) to align with gray bar, z-index: 1 ensures it's on top

arrows_before.approach: background-image with multi-layer SVG data URI + gradient

benefits: Easy to flip with transform: scaleX(-1)
arrows_after.implementation: ::before has white background with mask-image (SVG shape), gradient is simple background property

grayBar.spacing: pb-3 (12px) on nav-links creates space below items for bar

currentPageGradientOverlay.position: absolute, bottom: -12px (aligns with gray bar), left: 0
currentPageGradientOverlay.alignment: -12px offset matches pb-3 (12px) to position gradient exactly on top of gray bar

itemGaps.effect: Visual separation between all pagination items

arrowIcon.maskProperties: mask-image, mask-size: contain, mask-repeat: no-repeat, mask-position: center

gradientOverlay.position: on current page number, aligned with gray bar

verification.accessibility: maintained (ARIA attributes, keyboard support, screen reader announcements)
verification.visualIntegrity: single continuous gray bar, gradient overlay on current item, arrows visible and reliable
